---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for RCO
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? (e.g., workflow you can't do today)

## Proposed behavior
What should happen when this feature is used?

## Alternatives
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional context
Screenshots, examples, or links if relevant.
